title: RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER - 211info
text: RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place for individuals who are in recovery to hang out, drink coffee, and seek alternatives to ingrained substance abuse habits by developing new hobbies. 146 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as having a substance use abuse history and are in recovery Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (458) 544-0000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 544-0000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, visit website for more information, or call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Substance Use Disorder Drop In Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - SUPPORTED EMPLOYMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - ACCESS TO MEDICAL HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY BASED PEER MENTORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
